series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, disbursement queries and correspondence from parents, students and financial aid officers related to this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain correspondence from students, parents and institutions and checks received from institutions in office 4 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain student names, Social Security Numbers and award amounts entered by institutions through HEI website for 4 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
